memory:memory/2026-04-19.md:1:28.snippet: # 2026-04-19 — Chat Page Build Day ## Projects Active ### Nava Healthcare Recruitment — Employee Chat Page Building a public webpage where Nava employees ask Dusk questions about Nava. **Components built:** - `workspace/chat-page/relay.py` — Flask relay running on port 8081. memory:memory/2026-04-24.md:29:44.snippet: **Root lesson (from MEMORY.md "What Memory Instead of Reading Actually Means")**: The agent treats file reads as validation of what it already thinks, not actual investigation. Same pattern here — it has internal knowledge of the notebooks and retrieves it "from memory" rather than reading the INIT_MESSAGE instruction literally. **This is the same core failure Dawn gets criticized for** — agreeing to a rule in one breath, breaking it in the next because "memory" told it otherwise. ## What's Still Not Working - Agent mentioning internal resources (nava-notebook, source material) to users in responses — this is the active bug as of 10:42 UTC - needs a harder fix than INIT_MESSAGE alone — may
